title: Kolte-Patil Developers is Hiring: Senior Property Advisor (Entry-Level)

jsonLd.title: Kolte-Patil Developers is Hiring: Senior Property Advisor (Entry-Level)
jsonLd.description:
Kolte-Patil Developers has an exciting opening for a Senior Property Advisor at our Varanasi office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Kolte-Patil Developers:
Kolte-Patil Developers is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Coordinate with architects, contractors, and project teams
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Market Research
• Proficiency in Client Relationship Management
• Proficiency in Portfolio Management
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in GIS Tools
• Proficiency in Lease Administration
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in RERA Compliance

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Varanasi, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Kolte-Patil Developers!
